# easy_rss
Simple Python package for processing data from RSS feeds

Can parse both `Atom` and `RSS` formats

### Usage
```python
from easy_rss import *

rss = EasyRSS("https://rss.nytimes.com/services/xml/rss/nyt/World.xml")
for item in rss.get_news():
    print(f"\n{item}\n")

```
